channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bahrain EDB's CEO H.E. Noor is doubling down on growth amid mounting regional headwinds
item.description: While Gulf states compete with scale and mega-projects, Bahrain takes a different approach—focusing on regulatory innovation and specialization.

item.title: MassMutual CEO says Americans' share of the U.S. debt is going up $10 a day
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Bahrain EDB bids to win investors despite mounting headwinds
item.description: As the race for Gulf capital intensifies, Bahrain is competing on its own terms.

item.title: Oil price update for July 14, 2026
item.description: Fluctuations in oil prices influence energy costs and the price of everyday goods. Here is why.
